title: Implement mesh to Yggdrasil forwarding/routing logic
description: Add forward function in gateway and node IPv6 routing to prefer RPL for local, forward to Yggdrasil TUN otherwise. Update rpl_dodag, routing table. In C for node.
close_reason: mesh<->Yggdrasil forwarding implemented preferring RPL local then Yggdrasil TUN. Updated rpl_routing, router classify/route, hybrid.rs. 3 codereview passes (beads 3ano,ydtk,cyag) completed with no P0/P1. Tests pass. Mimic style, no comments added.
